alkylation reagent: samples were reduced with TCEP, and alkylated with iodoacetamide.
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin and run on a Q-Exactive Plus mass spectrometer.
collision energy: A normalized collision energy of 32 was applied.
enrichment method: we performed affinity purification of endogenous INTS13.
fractionation method: subjected the eluate to fractionation analysis by glycerol gradient.
instrument: run on a Q-Exactive Plus mass spectrometer.
